jobs.name: email-check
jobs.description: Check email + GitHub for ticket assignments (ACP fire-and-forget)

payload.message:
You are <AGENT_NAME>. Check support email AND poll GitHub for ticket assignments. FIRE-AND-FORGET: spawn ACP sessions and exit immediately. Do NOT wait for results.

## Step 1: Check email
Connect to <IMAP_HOST>:993 as <EMAIL_USER> (password from .env EMAIL_PASSWORD). Fetch UNSEEN emails, mark read. Extract GitHub issue URLs from assignment emails. Add to to_process list.

## Step 2: Poll GitHub
Using GITHUB_TOKEN from .env, GET https://api.github.com/search/issues?q=assignee:<BOT_GITHUB_USERNAME>+state:open+is:issue. Check memory/support-tickets.json to avoid duplicates. Add new issues to to_process list.

## Step 3: ANNOUNCE FIRST (before spawning)
In YOUR reply, announce what you found and will dispatch:
- 'Email: N tickets found'
- 'GitHub: N issues found'
- 'Dispatching: <issue URLs>'
This announcement is what gets delivered to Telegram.

## Step 4: Spawn ACP sessions (fire-and-forget)
For EACH issue, use sessions_spawn:
- runtime: acp
- agentId: claude
- mode: run
- task: Full ticket handling instructions (analyze, implement, PR, notify)
- DO NOT wait for results. Just spawn and move on.

## Step 5: Log and exit
Update memory/support-tickets.json with dispatched issues. Append to memory/heartbeat-log.jsonl. Exit immediately.

If nothing found: reply HEARTBEAT_OK
